name: Boss says my hearing loss is from age, not job noise—how do I prove it's work-related?
description: Audiogram + expert linking to job noise pattern; challenge age excuse with exposure proof.[3][5]

mainEntity.name: Boss says my hearing loss is from age, not job noise—how do I prove it's work-related?

acceptedAnswer.text: Audiogram + expert linking to job noise pattern; challenge age excuse with exposure proof.[3][5]
acceptedAnswer.description: Prove work-related by medical evidence linking loss to occupational noise, like audiograms showing high-frequency notch typical of noise-induced loss.[3][5] Experts must opine job noise caused or aggravated it over age-related decline.[1][3] Key factors: Job noise logs or surveys above 85 dB, no pre-existing audiograms showing progression, rule out other causes.[1][5] Collect coworker statements, safety violation records, get second opinion if disputed.[5] Don't accept denial—appeal with lawyer support.[3]
